creator: petef@databits.net
text:
5A
 Subject: Re: ports/28758: New port: security/apg
 Reply-To: 
 
 Here's a diff against your version in the tree already:
 
 Index: Makefile
 ===================================================================
 RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/security/apg/Makefile,v
 retrieving revision 1.3
 diff -u -r1.3 Makefile
 --- Makefile	2001/04/09 11:09:32	1.3
 +++ Makefile	2001/07/06 16:15:14
 @@ -6,15 +6,23 @@
  #
  
  PORTNAME=	apg
 -PORTVERSION=	1.2.13
 +PORTVERSION=	2.0.0a3
  CATEGORIES=	security
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.adel.nursat.kz/apg/download/
  
  MAINTAINER=	roam@FreeBSD.org
  
 -USE_GMAKE=	yes
 +USE_PERL5=	yes
  
 -MAN1=		apg.1
 +MAN1=		apg.1 apgbfm.1
  MAN8=		apgd.8
 +
 +post-install:
 +.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
 +	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/apg
 +	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/APG_TIPS ${PREFIX}/share/doc/apg
 +	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/rfc0972.txt ${PREFIX}/share/doc/apg
 +	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/rfc1750.txt ${PREFIX}/share/doc/apg
 +.endif
  
  .include <bsd.port.mk>
 Index: distinfo
 ===================================================================
 RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/security/apg/distinfo,v
 retrieving revision 1.2
 diff -u -r1.2 distinfo
 --- distinfo	2001/04/09 11:09:32	1.2
 +++ distinfo	2001/07/06 16:15:23
 @@ -1 +1 @@
 -MD5 (apg-1.2.13.tar.gz) = 4c6a5d15afd620a78df9f68070215427
 +MD5 (apg-2.0.0a3.tar.gz) = 690d72762468ad437d32f63f49d938cd
 Index: pkg-descr
 ===================================================================
 RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/security/apg/pkg-descr,v
 retrieving revision 1.1
 diff -u -r1.1 pkg-descr
 --- pkg-descr	2001/01/20 00:13:14	1.1
 +++ pkg-descr	2001/07/06 16:13:41
 @@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
  An automated password generator, using several strong algorithms
  for random and/or pronounceable password generation, and a built-in
 -pseudo-random number generator.
 +pseudo-random number generator.  This package also comes with an
 +RFC972-compliant password generation server.
  
  WWW:		http://www.adel.nursat.kz/apg/
  Author:		Adel I. Mirzazhanov <a-del@iname.com>
 Index: pkg-plist
 ===================================================================
 RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/security/apg/pkg-plist,v
 retrieving revision 1.1
 diff -u -r1.1 pkg-plist
 --- pkg-plist	2001/01/20 00:13:14	1.1
 +++ pkg-plist	2001/07/06 16:14:10
 @@ -1,2 +1,7 @@
  bin/apg
 +bin/apgbfm
  sbin/apgd
 +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/apg/APG_TIPS
 +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/apg/rfc0972.txt
 +%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/apg/rfc1750.txt
 +%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm share/doc/apg
 
 --
